title: thelypteris aureoglandulifera
intro: Thelypteris aureoglandulifera, also known as the golden club fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris aureoglandulifera are said to include the treatment of fever, sore throat, and other respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
